title: CVA6 CPU-execution substrate: real core fetching+executing M-mode firmware through the RTL DRAM-controller/fabric simulation path
claim_boundary: Executable substrate for booting the OS, NOT a Linux boot. Real RTL datapath in Verilator simulation; the LPDDR5X analog PHY is physical and out of scope.

datapath.adapter: rtl/top/adapters/e1_cva6_to_e1axi4.sv (NoC struct -> flat AXI4, inside rtl/cpu/e1_cva6_wrapper.sv)
datapath.dram: rtl/memory/dram_ctrl/e1_dram_ctrl.sv (AXI4 DRAM-controller RTL model, 2 GiB @ 0x8000_0000, DFI init-complete tied; sim backing store preloaded via +E1_DRAM_PRELOAD_HEX)
datapath.clint: rtl/interrupts/e1_clint.sv @ 0x0200_0000 (AXI4->AXI-Lite shim e1_axi4_to_axilite_slave); mtip_o -> CVA6 time_irq_i, msip_o -> ipi_i
datapath.plic: rtl/interrupts/e1_plic.sv @ 0x0C00_0000 (structural; irq_o -> CVA6 irq_i[1] M-mode external)
datapath.reset_gate: rtl/security/rot/e1_rot_reset_seq.sv (CVA6 held in reset until boot_verified_i AND iopmp_policy_ready_i; lc_scrap_i = permanent halt)

firmware: fw/bare-metal/e1-cva6-dram-boot/boot.S (RV64 M-mode, linked at DRAM base 0x8000_0000)

execution_proof.instruction_fetch_through_dram_controlle: DRAM slave AR=23, R=46 (CVA6 fetched its program through the RTL DRAM-controller/fabric simulation path)
execution_proof.dram_data_writes: DRAM slave AW=10, W=10, B=10 (CVA6 wrote through the RTL DRAM path)
execution_proof.clint_programmed: CLINT slave AW=4 (mtimecmp hi/lo set + disarmed in the trap)
execution_proof.store_load_roundtrip: MARK_ALIVE = 0x1122334455667788 written and read back (MARK_ECHO matches)
execution_proof.timer_trap_taken: mcause = 0x8000000000000007 (machine timer interrupt), mepc = 0x80000_00a4 (in the wait loop)

fabric_fix: Fixed a latent static-lifetime loop-local bug in e1_axi4_interconnect.sv (AW/AR enqueue recorded the wrong slave index when more than one slave is mapped); now `automatic`.

opensbi.what_was_done: Added the missing platform Kconfig + configs/defconfig and updated sw/opensbi/platform/eliza/platform.c to the v1.8.1 driver API (no-arg irqchip_init/timer_init folding the ACLINT MSWI, console via early_init uart8250_init 7-arg, dropped the removed .console_init/.ipi_init members, TRUE->true).
opensbi.toolchain_note: OpenSBI requires a PIE-capable linker; built with external/riscv64-linux-gnu (needs LD_LIBRARY_PATH=external/riscv64-linux-gnu/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu for libopcodes). The bare-metal newlib toolchain (riscv-none-elf) cannot link PIEs.
opensbi.remaining_gap: Running OpenSBI to its banner on CVA6 in-sim needs a ns16550a UART model @ 0x10001000 wired into the boot top and a DTB in a1; that is the documented next step toward OpenSBI -> S-mode -> Linux.

remaining_gap_to_linux: OpenSBI early M-mode init -> S-mode handoff, a kernel Image + DTB + initramfs payload at 0x8020_0000, the multi-hour Verilator boot run, and a performance core (the CVA6 little core is the bring-up vehicle, not the final big core).
